creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #10)
This patch was submitted by the maintainer, Pavel Volkov <pavelivolkov@gmail.com> so it is fine. :-)

I think koobs@ was wanting to ask cy@ (maintainer of sqlite in base) if there is anything in 3.32.3 we need to be aware. But I think it's fine from the maintainer who maintains this port well.

BTW, thanks for working on updating base, cy@.
